description: Address review issues: (1) Move Rnn diagonal loading from updateRnn() to computeMvdrWeights(), (2) Fix overlap-add startup silence by passthrough until first frame processed, (3) Fix frame truncation by looping over chunks, (4) Fix OLA gain with normalization factor, (5) Fix isBeamformingActive() to check stereoInputAvailable_.
steps: 1. In mvdr_beamformer.h: Remove kReg addition from updateRnn(), add it just before inversion in computeMvdrWeights().
2. In mvdr_beamformer.h: Add firstFrameProcessed_ boolean, passthrough ch0 until first STFT frame is synthesized.
3. In mvdr_beamformer.h: No changes needed (beamformer processes any numFrames already). Fix in audio_engine.cpp: loop over chunks of kMaxBeamBlockSize.
4. In mvdr_beamformer.h: Apply OLA normalization factor of 1.0f/0.75f after overlap-add accumulation in processFrame.
5. In audio_engine.cpp: Fix isBeamformingActive() to also check stereoInputAvailable_.
acceptance_criteria: kReg is not added in updateRnn() but is applied to diagonal before inversion in computeMvdrWeights()
Output passes through ch0 until the first full STFT frame has been synthesized
Frames beyond kMaxBeamBlockSize are processed in chunks, not dropped
OLA output is normalized by 1.0f/0.75f to compensate Hann window pair
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only passes on mvdr_beamformer.h standalone (exit code 0, no errors). Issue #6 (no tests) skipped as no test framework is available for native C++ in this sandbox.
